title: Editor Settings
intro: Here you can customize various editor settings according to your preferences, settings are automatically saved as they are updated.
intro_assistant: Connect your AI provider accounts, pick default models, and test connectivity. Keys are stored locally and never leave your machine.
settings_file_info: Your settings file is located at
settings_file_info_assistant: Your AI provider config and conversations are stored at
autoindent_help: Automatically indent text on new lines.
wordwrap_help: Automatically break lines to fit the width of the editor.
scrollsync_help: Enable scroll sync between the editor and the preview.
session_restore_help: Reopen your previous tabs, workspace folder, and cursor positions when MKEditor starts.
clear_session_help: Wipes the persisted session file. Currently open tabs stay open; the next launch starts fresh.
clear_session_confirm_text: This wipes the persisted session file. Currently open tabs stay open; the next launch will start fresh.
systemtheme_help: Let your system theme override your stored settings.
